message:
fix(storage): Prevent duplicate daily_stats updates when using "all"

The update_daily_stats_in_tx() function was unconditionally updating
four entries for every stats update:
  - (agent_slug, source_id)
  - ("all", source_id)
  - (agent_slug, "all")
  - ("all", "all")

This caused duplicate updates when agent_slug or source_id was already
"all", since ("all", source_id) would be written twice, or
(agent_slug, "all") would be written twice.

The fix conditionally builds the update list:
- Only add (agent_slug, source_id) if neither is "all"
- Only add ("all", source_id) if source_id != "all"
- Only add (agent_slug, "all") if agent_slug != "all"
- Always add ("all", "all") as the global total

This prevents redundant database writes and ensures accurate aggregate
counts when querying stats filtered by agent or source.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
